package rulecoverage

func NegativeHandlerCallsDatabaseSqlDirectlyOutsideRepository() string {
    ruleID := "handler_calls_database_sql_directly_outside_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handler packages that import `database/sql`, `sqlx`, or `pgx` and execute queries directly."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
